title: Anchor Stages
description: Improves the visibility and clarity between anchor stages(charged by glowstone). Made for CPVP (crystal).
body:
# Anchor Stages
This pack adds new trim-like patterns to the anchor to make it more visible and clear, in which anchors are charged and at what stage they are. This pack is built primarily for CPVP.
It also changes the texture of glowstone.

![A screenshot of a line of respawn anchors, all with different stages. Shot from the front.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/912fa56ae5da37acb1bde1e97062a92391886c8a.png)

![A photo of a glowstone block in front of a group of trees. The focus of the shot is on the glowstone.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc45e36b74db48d7a1d736f8402451de1f76bc69.png)

If you wish to add this in a pack, you certainly may, but please credit me in the description.
